violations.text: Handwashing sink in the men's restroom is lacking hand washing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Leak was observed at plumbing under 3 bay sink.Systems be maintained in good repair and/or proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2025
Lowboy located in the prep area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures).Equipment was taken out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the cabinets under beverage machine in dining room have an accumulation of dust, soil residue, and/or rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the counters under coffee machine have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
